# Friction Report

> Copy this template into #dev-flow Slack. Fill all fields. Delete this header line.

---

**Date**: YYYY-MM-DD
**Reporter**: [your name]
**Task**: TASK-NNN (or describe task context)

## Phase hit

> Which phase or gate triggered this friction? (e.g. Gate 0, Phase 3 Design, Phase 7 Security)

[phase name]

## Expected behavior

> What did you expect to happen?

[describe expected]

## Observed behavior

> What actually happened? Include exact output, error messages, or AI response excerpt.

[describe observed]

## Suggested fix

> Optional. What would have made this better?

[leave blank if unsure]

## Severity

- [ ] **low** — inconvenient but worked around in <5 min
- [ ] **medium** — lost >5 min, required backtracking, or produced ambiguous output
- [ ] **high** — blocked completely; could not proceed without external help

---

> **Do not edit below this line.**
